name: Enumerate Credentials from Windows Credential Manager With PowerShell
notes: This rule detects adversaries searching for common password storage locations to obtain user credentials.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [vaultcmd or listcreds]
TD_list: APPLY Enumerate Credentials from Windows Credential Manager With PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [vaultcmd or listcreds]
RED_list: Event name: Enumerate Credentials from Windows Credential Manager With PowerShell
Event description: Detects adversaries searching for common password storage locations to obtain user credentials.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
